pandocultimateconverter: Name of this extension. Shown as the title of the special page.
pandocultimateconverter-desc: Short description of the extension, shown in the extension credits list.
pandocultimateconverter-summary: Short description of the extension, used in various places.
pandocultimateconverter-warning-page-nam: Warning shown when the user-entered article title is too short or too long. $1 is the minimum allowed character count, $2 is the maximum allowed character count.
Warning shown when the article title contains characters that are not allowed in page titles. $1 is a list of the invalid characters found.
pandocultimateconverter-warning-file-not: Warning shown when the user tries to submit the form without selecting a file.
pandocultimateconverter-history-comment: Edit summary appended to the page revision history when Pandoc converts a file into a wiki page.
pandocultimateconverter-conversion-compl: Edit summary used when the uploaded source file is automatically deleted after successful conversion.
pandocultimateconverter-special-upload-d: Introductory description shown at the top of the special page upload form.
pandocultimateconverter-special-upload-f: Label for the file-selection section of the upload form.
Label for the file input field.
pandocultimateconverter-special-source-t: Label for the source-type selector (File vs URL) dropdown.
pandocultimateconverter-special-url-labe: Label for the URL input field.
pandocultimateconverter-special-page-lab: Label for the target wiki page name input field.
pandocultimateconverter-special-page-pla: Placeholder text inside the target page name input field.
pandocultimateconverter-special-upload-t: Label for the section where the user enters the target wiki page name.
pandocultimateconverter-special-upload-b: Label text on the submit button of the upload/convert form.
pandocultimateconverter-loading: Text shown inside a loading overlay while a file is being uploaded and converted.
pandocultimateconverter-error-upload: Error message shown when a file upload fails for a generic reason. $1 is the error detail returned by the server.
pandocultimateconverter-error-filetype-b: Error message shown when the uploaded file type is not allowed. $1 is the file extension (e.g. 'docx'). $2 is the PHP variable prefix ('$wg') — do not translate it. The full PHP snippet '$2wgFileExtensions[] = "$1";' must remain syntactically correct.
pandocultimateconverter-error-uploaddisa: Error message shown when file uploads are disabled on the wiki. The PHP snippet '$wgEnableUploads = true;' is a code literal and must not be translated.
pandocultimateconverter-error-mustbelogg: Error message shown when an anonymous user tries to upload a file.
pandocultimateconverter-error-generic: Generic fallback error message when a file upload fails. $1 is the error detail returned by the server.
apierror-pandocultimateconverter-nosourc: API error shown when the caller omits both 'filename' and 'url' parameters.
apierror-pandocultimateconverter-multipl: API error shown when the caller supplies both 'filename' and 'url' parameters simultaneously.
apierror-pandocultimateconverter-invalid: API error shown when the provided URL uses a scheme other than http or https.
apierror-pandocultimateconverter-pageexi: API error shown when the target page already exists and forceoverwrite was not set.
apierror-pandocultimateconverter-convers: API error shown when Pandoc fails to convert the source. $1 is the error message from Pandoc.
apihelp-pandocconvert-summary: One-line summary of the pandocconvert API module, shown in API help pages.
apihelp-pandocconvert-param-pagename: Description of the 'pagename' parameter shown in API help.
apihelp-pandocconvert-param-filename: Description of the 'filename' parameter shown in API help.
apihelp-pandocconvert-param-url: Description of the 'url' parameter shown in API help.
apihelp-pandocconvert-param-forceoverwri: Description of the 'forceoverwrite' parameter shown in API help.
apihelp-pandocconvert-example-file: Label for the file-based example in the API help page.
apihelp-pandocconvert-example-url: Label for the URL-based example in the API help page.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-descriptio: Introductory description shown at the top of the Codex-based special page.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-switch-cla: Label for the link that switches from the Codex UI to the classic upload form.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-tab-files: Label for the Files tab in the Codex interface.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-tab-urls: Label for the URLs tab in the Codex interface.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-dropzone-t: Primary text shown in the file drag-and-drop zone.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-dropzone-h: Hint text shown below the drop zone listing supported file formats.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-urls-place: Placeholder text in the URLs textarea.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-urls-add: Label for the button that adds entered URLs to the conversion queue.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-urls-fetch: Text shown while fetching page titles from URLs.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-queue-summ: Summary line showing the number of items queued. $1 is the count.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-queue-over: Warning shown when queued items target pages that already exist. $1 is the count of such pages.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-page-exist: Warning shown on an individual queue item when its target page already exists.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-convert-al: Label for the button that starts converting all queued items.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-clear-all: Label for the button that removes all items from the queue.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-overwrite-: Label for the checkbox that allows overwriting existing pages.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-status-upl: Status text shown while a file is being uploaded.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-status-con: Status text shown while a file is being converted.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-status-don: Status text shown when conversion is complete.
Status text shown when Pandoc conversion is complete but AI cleanup has not been run.
Status text shown when AI cleanup has completed successfully.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-status-err: Status text shown when an error occurs. $1 is the error message.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-retry: Label for the button to retry a failed conversion.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-column-sou: Column header for the source file or URL.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-column-tar: Column header for the target wiki page name.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-column-sta: Column header for the conversion status.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-column-act: Column header for the actions column.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-navigate-w: Confirmation message shown when the user tries to leave while conversion is in progress.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-invalid-ur: Error message shown when a URL is invalid or uses an unsupported scheme.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-convert-on: Tooltip or label for the button that converts a single queued item.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-remove-ite: Label for the button that removes a single item from the queue.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-stop: Label for the button that stops mass conversion after the current item finishes.
pandocultimateconverter-codex-stop-reque: Label shown on the stop button after it has been clicked, while waiting for the current item to finish.
pandocexport: Name of the Pandoc Export special page, shown as the page title.
pandocexport-summary: Short description of the Pandoc Export special page, shown in the list of special pages.
pandocultimateconverter-export-descripti: Introductory description shown at the top of the export special page.
pandocultimateconverter-export-items-lab: Label for the section where the user selects which pages and categories to export.
pandocultimateconverter-export-add-item: Label for the button that adds another page or category input to the export form.
pandocultimateconverter-export-separate-: Label for the checkbox that makes each page export to its own file, bundled in a ZIP archive.
pandocultimateconverter-export-drag-hint: Tooltip shown on the drag handle icon used to reorder pages in the export list.
pandocultimateconverter-export-pages-lab: Label for the section where the user selects which pages to export.
pandocultimateconverter-export-add-page: Label for the button that adds another page name input to the export form.
pandocultimateconverter-export-page-plac: Placeholder text inside a page name input field on the export form.
pandocultimateconverter-export-page-not-: Error message shown below the page search input when the entered page or category does not exist.
pandocultimateconverter-export-format-la: Label for the format selector dropdown on the export form.
pandocultimateconverter-export-remove-pa: Accessible label for the button that removes a page from the export list.
pandocultimateconverter-export-button: Label for the main Export submit button.
pandocultimateconverter-export-preparing: Text shown on the Export button while the file is being prepared for download.
pandocultimateconverter-export-error-no-: Error message shown when the user clicks Export without entering any page names.
pandocultimateconverter-export-error-inv: Error message shown when an unsupported export format is requested.
pandocultimateconverter-export-error-fai: Error message shown when the server-side Pandoc export fails. $1 is the error detail.
pandocultimateconverter-toolbox-export: Label for the Export link shown in the page toolbox (sidebar) that navigates to the Pandoc Export special page.
confluencemigration: Title of the Confluence Migration special page.
confluencemigration-summary: Short description of the Confluence Migration special page, shown in the list of special pages.
confluencemigration-desc: Introductory paragraph shown at the top of Special:ConfluenceMigration, explaining what the page does and mentioning both Cloud and Server support.
confluencemigration-disabled: Message shown on Special:ConfluenceMigration when the feature has been disabled by the wiki administrator via the PandocUltimateConverter_EnableConfluenceMigration config setting.
confluencemigration-url-label: Label for the Confluence base URL input field.
confluencemigration-url-help: Small hint text shown below the URL field, giving example URLs for Cloud and Server. The URL examples (https://yourcompany.atlassian.net and https://confluence.yourcompany.com) are technical placeholders and should not be translated.
confluencemigration-spacekey-label: Label for the Confluence space key input field (e.g. DOCS, DEV).
confluencemigration-user-label: Label for the Confluence authentication username/email field. This field is optional for Confluence Server when using a Personal Access Token (PAT).
confluencemigration-user-help: Help text shown below the username/email field, explaining that the field is optional for Confluence Server PAT auth.
confluencemigration-token-label: Label for the Confluence authentication token/password/PAT field.
confluencemigration-prefix-label: Label for the optional target page prefix field. If filled, all migrated pages are placed under this prefix (e.g. 'Confluence/DOCS/Page Title'). Can also be a namespace like 'MyNS:' or 'MyNS:subprefix'.
confluencemigration-prefix-help: Small hint text shown below the prefix field. Explains: empty = no prefix; plain path = prefix + '/' + title; prefix ending with a non-alphanumeric character (e.g. 'aa_', 'aa/') = that character used directly as separator; 'MyNS:' = namespace only; 'MyNS:sub' = namespace + sub-prefix.
confluencemigration-overwrite-label: Label for the checkbox that allows the migration job to overwrite wiki pages that already exist.
confluencemigration-categorize-label: Label for the auto-categorize checkbox on the Confluence migration form. When enabled, imported pages are automatically placed into MediaWiki categories matching their Confluence space hierarchy.
confluencemigration-submit: Label for the submit button on the migration form.
confluencemigration-submitting: Text shown on the submit button while the API request is in progress (replacing the normal 'Start migration' label).
confluencemigration-queued: Success message shown after the migration job has been queued. $1 is the Confluence space key.
confluencemigration-history-comment: Edit summary added to the page revision history when a page is created or updated by the Confluence migration job.
confluencemigration-category-comment: Edit summary used when a page is automatically categorized as part of a Confluence migration.
confluencemigration-error-invalid-url: Validation error shown when the entered Confluence URL is not a valid https:// URL.
confluencemigration-error-empty-spacekey: Validation error shown when the space key field is left empty.
confluencemigration-error-empty-credenti: Validation error shown when the email/username or API token/password field is left empty. Kept for backward compatibility.
confluencemigration-error-empty-user-clo: Validation error shown when the Confluence Cloud URL is entered but the email/username field is left empty.
confluencemigration-error-empty-token: Validation error shown when the API token/password/PAT field is left empty.
confluencemigration-error-invalid-prefix: Validation error shown when the target page prefix contains a colon (namespace syntax) but the namespace before the colon is not recognised on this wiki.
confluencemigration-notify-done: Echo notification body sent to the user when the migration job finishes. $1 is the Confluence space key, $2 is the number of pages migrated.
apierror-pandocconfluencemigrate-disable: API error shown when the Confluence migration feature is disabled on the wiki via PandocUltimateConverter_EnableConfluenceMigration = false.
apierror-pandocconfluencemigrate-invalid: API error shown when the provided Confluence URL does not start with https://.
apierror-pandocconfluencemigrate-cloudne: API error shown when the Confluence URL points to Cloud (*.atlassian.net) but no username/email was provided.
apierror-pandocconfluencemigrate-authfai: API error shown when the Confluence credentials are rejected. $1 is the error detail from the HTTP call.
apierror-pandocconfluencemigrate-invalid: API error shown when the namespace part of the target prefix (before the colon) is not a known namespace on this wiki. $1 is the unrecognised namespace name as entered by the user.
apierror-pandocconfluencemigrate-service: API error shown when the user specifies a built-in or talk namespace (Main, File, Category, Template, etc.) as the import target namespace. Only custom non-talk namespaces (ID ≥ 100) are accepted.
apihelp-pandocconfluencemigrate-summary: One-line summary of the pandocconfluencemigrate API module, shown in API help pages.
